name: Bonnies' Surprise Cake
recipeIngredient: Jar of Pie Filling (Cherry, Blueberry, Apple, or Peach)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the jar of pie filling in a mixing bowl and mix until it becomes gummy.
2. Grease a cake pan.
3. Place half of the batter in the bottom of the pan and spread it around.
4. Add the jar of fruit pie filling on top of the batter.
5. Spread the remaining batter over the top.
6. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.
7. Bake in an oven set to 325°F (165°C) for about 1 hour.
8. For a 13x9 inch baking dish, double the recipe.
